commands.repair_reason: Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for rebase, blocking code fixes, and real behavior proof; automation should not take this over while proof is missing.; Needs attention: The patch touches local attachment path allowlisting and introduces a stale realpath cache that needs security-boundary repair before merge.; Review finding: [P2] Rethrow registration-load failures from the limiter — src/gateway/exec-approv... (sha=717b12d1de51b90f651b5f5c68617e647d8a3cf6)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds caching and concurrency changes in session target discovery, device auth storage, media attachment canonicalization, tracked temp cleanup, and iOS exec approval APNs registration loading.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings by source inspection: the limiter contract returns errors in metadata instead of throwing, and the media cache can reuse stale canonicalization. I did not run tests because this was a read-only checkout review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up for rebase, blocking code fixes, and real behavior proof; automation should not take this over while proof is missing.

target.title: perf: reduce latency across async I/O hot paths
target.body:
## Summary

- **`device-auth-store`**: Add mtime-based read cache (`storeReadCache`). `readStore` now calls `statSync` first and skips `readFileSync` entirely when the file on disk hasn't changed. `writeStore` populates the cache after each write so the next read is always a hit. Avoids repeated blocking reads on a file that rarely changes.

- **`targets.ts` (async path)**: Replace value-caching `Map<string, string>` with a promise-caching `Map<string, Promise<string | undefined>>` in `getRealAgentsRoot`. Previously, all concurrent `Promise.all` lanes that shared the same `agentsRoot` path would race past the empty Map and each fire an independent `fs.realpath`; now the first caller owns the Promise and all others await the same result.

- **`tracked-temp-dirs`**: Decouple directory listing from deletion in `cleanup()`. All `readdir` calls now run in parallel first, then all `rm` calls run in parallel across every root at once, rather than being serialised root-by-root.

- **`attachments.cache`**: Add a `realpathCache: Map<string, Promise<string | undefined>>` per `MediaAttachmentCache` instance. `resolveCanonicalLocalPath` was previously called twice with the same path per file access (once from `ensureLocalStat`, again from `readLocalBuffer`). Now the second call returns the already-in-flight Promise.

- **`exec-approval-ios-push`**: Cap `loadRegisteredTargets` at 10 concurrent APNS registration reads using the existing `runTasksWithConcurrency` utility, preventing socket exhaustion when many devices are registered.

## What's not changed

- `shell-env.ts` — `readEtcShells` already has a module-level `cachedEtcShells` guard; it only reads `/etc/shells` once per process lifetime.
- `allow-from-store-file.ts` — the sync path already has mtime+size-based caching via `allowFromReadCache`; `readFileSync` only runs on a cache miss.
- HTTP keep-alive — already handled via the global `undici` dispatcher set up in `undici-global-dispatcher.ts`.
- `server-channels.ts` — `startChannels` already uses an 8-worker pool; per-channel account lists are typically 1–2 entries.
- `vite.config.ts` — no framework plugin present; route-based code splitting requires reading the full UI source tree and is out of scope for this PR.

## Test plan

- [x] Run existing unit and integration test suites — no behaviour changes, only internal caching and concurrency limits
- [x] Verify `resolveAllAgentSessionStoreTargets` under concurrent load (multiple `agentsRoots` pointing to the same directory) no longer fires duplicate `realpath` calls
- [x] Smoke-test device auth token read/write round-trip with `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_STARTUP_TRACE=1`

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/claude-code)
target.author: ynachiket
